posts.cooked:
Hi there,i played to A Clones life and I LOVED IT because we were another character and everything was different.So I ask for that.
Is that possible to be Zoe or a Blafard?
Thanks in advance

Yes, use LBA Package Editor and replace Twinsens model with Zoes model.
Check the quick start and information thread.

Oh and, WELCOME to the MBN!!

Yeah, check the quick start and informations thread. You can easly do that job
Anyway, it could not work smothly because some Twinsen animations doesnt match with Zo body, but try and youll see

Welcome to the forum and enjoy your stay

posts.cooked: Well,im not really good with editors.I opened BODY.HRQ and i see a list,how do i replace ?
I said anything,i found how to replace,but i dont know how to aply it.I save but when i play,im not Zoe.
Because maybe you replace the wrong Twinsen body. There are many of them (Twinsen w/o tunic, Twinsen with tunic, etc.).

I replace Twisen without tunic with Zoe by
double clicking Zoe and save it somewhere.
And i went on Twisen without Tunic and i went in Commend,replace selected entris with and I selected the saved file (Zoe).
I save my project.

Now the only thing that I dont know is how to aply it.
Forgot,i found ! ITS COOOOOOOOOOL
she move like a bit of a spaz though, dont ya think?
Thats what make me laught a lot.If only it wasnt of the animationit could be cool.
i dont know much about this, but i seem to remember someone telling me you can swap the animations around

Anyway.Ill post a thread later.
Now i have a little problem.I replaced Zoe by Twisen and Zoe with Umbrella by Twisen with Tunic,but i dont work.I see Zoe as Zoeis that normal?
I forgot to say that I opened ANIM.HQR but,I only see Twinsens animation,I cant exchange.

Blafards61:

Anyway.Ill post a thread later.
Now i have a little problem.I replaced Zoe by Twisen and Zoe with Umbrella by Twisen with Tunic,but i dont work.I see Zoe as Zoeis that normal?

you need to put twinsen in place of zoe as well

you need to put twinsen in place of zoe as well

What do you mean by that?

there are many many zoe bodies, they are not all grouped together. there are some things in the game that seem to be strangely un-changable, like the car outside of your house. what is the deal with that damn car! no matter what i change the body entry to, its still the sam. always! mutter mutter kill mutter mutter car mutter mutter

anyway, yeah. you can make zoe move better by changing the animations, they are there, but there wont be one of say, zoe throwing darts, zoe running etc as they are not used in the game. lba1 would be better, because of the fighting zoe clone. your problem is almost certainly that you havnt found ALL of the zoe bodies and replaced them, or that you forgot to build the file (i do that alot:D)

my advice if you want to do a full mod, is that it is tedious. and boring. and sometimes you will go crazy because packed wont do quite the thing you want it to. this is why i gave up on Its a Clones Life, at least until the kinks in SceneManager are worked out (or Scene Editor, depending on who gets the life scripts worked out in a working version first :D). Then I shall come back wreaking a great vengance on my enemies, raining fire an such.

btw download and try out LBArchitect. you can alter and design new maps! the iscometric bricks are tricky at first, buut once you get the hang of it, things really can look very cool
Well,when I open ANIM.HQR (LBA2),I only see Twinsens animations,not other Characters one.Only on LBA1 that we can see all.Well,if someone can make the animation for me,It will be great (LBA2)

woah, that post i just wrote is so long that it got rplied before i was finished. spooky

blafard, if not sure whats going on with that. does your lba2 function properly? if so then i dont know. can you take a screen shot (with the prnt scrn button) and show us? otherwise i dont know whats wrong. is the file info for lba2 anims finished?

Thats showing that Im really in LBA2 folder and Choosing ANIM.HQR


Thats showing the end of my list with Twisens animation

And thats strange,because on Little Big Adventure File Information
there is no ANIM.HQR section in LBA,HQR.

And YES,my LBA 2 is working REALLY good,all the character have their animations.

yeah, i just checked mine and the problem is that the lba2 anim.hqr, being giganormous, has not been fully documented. therefore packEd cannot tell you which is which. i suggest that if you really want to do this mod you do it with lba1 which has fully listed anims and just about everything else, and all the maps can be modded
